column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for parts of Hardee, DeSoto until Aug 04 10:45PM. Download the ABC Action News App for the latest weather information.
Thunder and lightning have been getting worse in our area. It was quite all day, as far as that goes, until recently.
How long is this supposed to stick around?
I feel like it’s been sitting right on top of us for hours! The flooding is insane and we don’t have power. How about you?
Fortunately, we have power. But transformers keep going and it knocks everything out, but comes back on.
I hope it stays that way for you. I know we won’t get anything turned on until tomorrow. There’s no way they would send and put a crew in danger.
they are ready though.
Be safe.

Many yrs ago I was living in a different county in Florida. I got a green light to cross US 41. So glad, I was smart enough to pause before moving forward. A flatbed tow truck ran the red light and passed the intersection, came to a stop, awkwardly, at the median side of the road.(Assuming, health emergency). Fast forward a week later..
Worked all day, didn't feel like cooking. Drove to the 7-11 to get a sandwich. Wind was wicked crazy when I got there. Retail stores behind there had left shopping carts out. Blowing around like crazy. Double doors of 7-11 where propped open because they were getting a delivery. I took one step inside and my hair decided it was in a race to get inside first! Lol. Picked out a sandwich and went to check out, power went out. As I was driving home (without said sandwich), I realized I was driving over something. Waited the storm out, went to another convenience store hours later. Overheard an employee talking to an EMT. There had been a tornado. It hit a business selling storage sheds. I had been driving over the remnants of them!! My coworkers teased me for a while. Asking me if I had a death wish and calling me Dorothy! 😂 Reasons why I stay inside and prepare before hand.
